name: twinharness-dev
description: Development/preview channel for TwinHarness, the Agentic SDLC Orchestrator. Tracks the `dev` branch; install side-by-side with the stable `twinharness` marketplace.

plugins.name: twinharness
plugins.description: Agentic SDLC Orchestrator: tier-scaled SDLC stages, governing artifacts, slice-by-slice builds, and a deterministic `th` CLI for mechanical enforcement.
